description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that triggers on push to all branches except certain paths and tags, on pull requests to all branches except certain paths, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has three jobs: build_win, build_wheels, and upload-wheels. The build_win job runs on Windows with multiple Python versions and architectures, installing dependencies, building and testing the project. The build_wheels job runs on multiple operating systems, installing dependencies and building wheels with cibuildwheel. The upload-wheels job merges and uploads the built wheels as artifacts.
